summary: Candid handheld vertical phone footage of the CBP Commissioner giving a service/working dog (wearing a green Christmas collar) a 'pup cup' of whipped cream while staff and uniformed officers film and laugh. Lighthearted but raw, unscripted event B-roll with no music, narration, or cinematic editing, so it is not a produced genre piece.
notable_text: Operation Pup Cup complete; @CBPCommissioner gets it done
